title: update a set not_null_column = null, not_null_column = 2 should not raise an err
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a INT NOT NULL, b INT, c VARCHAR(10));
UPDATE t SET a = 2 WHERE c = 'test';
UPDATE t SET a = 3 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM t WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: updating not null column with null then valid value
